description: Bar chart driven by DuckDB SQL query.

sql.description: DuckDB SQL query with {{udf_name}} and $param_name placeholders. Must return 'label' and 'value' columns.

barColor.description: Bar fill color. Default is Fused lime yellow (#E8FF59).

barRadius.description: Corner radius of bars in pixels. 0 for sharp corners.

hoverColor.description: Bar fill color on hover. If omitted, no hover highlight is shown.

showGrid.description: Show subtle horizontal grid lines behind bars.

rotateLabels.description: Rotate x-axis labels -45 degrees. Useful for long category names.

horizontal.description: If true, renders horizontal bars (categories on y-axis, values on x-axis). Good for ranked lists.

showValues.description: Show the numeric value label on each bar.

xAxisFontSize.description: Font size for x-axis labels in pixels.

yAxisFontSize.description: Font size for y-axis labels in pixels.

bottomMargin.description: Bottom margin in pixels. Overrides the auto-calculated value from rotateLabels. Useful when labels are clipped.

beginAtZero.description: Force the value axis to start at 0.

animationMs.description: Bar animation duration in milliseconds. 0 disables animation. Default 300ms, and animation only runs when data changes.

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string (e.g., "padding: 8px; background-color: #1a1a1a")

propsSchema.description: A bar chart powered by DuckDB SQL queries against UDF outputs. Query must return 'label' and 'value' columns. Uses {{udf_name}} placeholders to reference UDF DataFrames.
